name: chrx/rental-manager
description: Chrx Rental Manager — a self-contained WordPress plugin for property management companies to track properties, units, tenants, leases, payments, and a tenant self-service portal.

notes: PDF library: dompdf/dompdf, added in the Payments & Receipts phase for PDF receipts (see src/Billing/ReceiptPdf.php for the full rationale) and reused as-is for landlord statement PDFs in the Landlord Dashboard & Reporting phase rather than adding a second dependency.
